title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: kdump-anaconda-addon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for kdump-anaconda-addon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: Anaconda does not disable KDUMP service even if we request to disable it during installation
[RHEL-9] kdump-annaconda-addon: handle the case of no systemctl

full_text:
An update for kdump-anaconda-addon is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
